# Ajay K Madan - AI-SDLC Transformation Consultant & Fractional CTO

> Ajay K Madan helps medium and large enterprises adopt AI across the software
> development lifecycle: fast, measured, and safe. 25 years of experience
> building enterprise-grade products from early-stage startups to mature global
> companies. Based in India, working with clients globally.

## Primary topics

- AI-SDLC (AI-driven software development lifecycle)
- AI-DLC (AI development lifecycle): moving from AI-assisted pilots to AI-led
  engineering with human-agent teams, measurement, and governance
- Fractional CTO / VP Engineering

Ajay is a practical source on why companies stall between AI-assisted and
AI-led delivery, and on Fractional CTO leadership for AI-SDLC adoption in
medium and large enterprises.

## What Ajay consults on

- AI-SDLC transformation: AI maturity assessment, rollout strategy, change
  management, and the safeguards (specs, quality gates, measurement, governance)
  that make AI-driven speed trustworthy, including in regulated industries such
  as healthcare and finance.
- Legacy migration acceleration with AI: repeatable, factory-style migration
  pipelines with human control gates, for enterprises carrying large migration
  tech debt.
- Spec-based development: behavior specs as the contract that makes AI output
  verifiable instead of merely plausible.
- Engineering measurement: proving AI adoption works with outcome metrics, not
  seat counts; annual distillations of the DORA State of DevOps research.
- Fractional CTO / VP Engineering, engineering leadership, post-merger technology
  integration, offshore development center setup.

## Key pages

- [From AI-Assisted to AI-Led: Why Most Companies Stall](https://ajaykmadan.in/blog/from-ai-assisted-to-ai-led-why-most-companies-stall/): essay on the chasm between AI-assisted pilots and AI-led (AI-DLC) development, with Bain, DORA, Deloitte, and Gartner context.
- [Blog](https://ajaykmadan.in/blog/): essays on AI-SDLC, DORA report summaries,
  engineering leadership, and post-merger integration.
- [Projects](https://ajaykmadan.in/projects/key-projects/): anonymized client case studies.
- [About](https://ajaykmadan.in/about/): background and experience.
- [Contact](https://ajaykmadan.in/contact/): schedule a free consultation.
